text: From Gotham’s shadows to those unhinged, unforgettable laughs, #MichaelKeaton signed shots tap into the actor who rewired Hollywood’s idea of a superhero—his Batman was the first big‑screen Dark Knight to crack $400M. eBay tinyurl.com/4ejmfmsj and Amazon tinyurl.com/zpd5ypfw

VeriSigned drops a metal milestone — rare signed shots of #JudasPriest axe architect #KKDowning, the co‑founder who helped ignite the twin‑guitar assault that pushed British steel onto the world stage. eBay tinyurl.com/mryvzenk and Amazon tinyurl.com/mr3wfxxr

Minted perfection meets hockey royalty 🏒 A #PSA10 #Parkhurst slab of #WayneGretzky is basically owning a freeze‑frame of the Great One at his peak — the only player to crack 200 points in a season (and he did it four times). tinyurl.com/8htw4efs
Lightning in a slab ⚡ #PSA10 #Panini drops #LamarJackson in full MVP chaos—blazing speed, record‑breaking burst, and a flawless grade to match. #graded #tradingcard tinyurl.com/3z92vn4d

10% off Beckett‑cert autos and PSA slabs from the same authentication giants trusted for the hobby’s crown‑jewel grails. The real pros already know the winning script: strike first, punch in code AAVLPCOX. eBay tinyurl.com/39mcnwhp Amazon tinyurl.com/4wdfm4ea

Crank the groove and pin a little rock history—these signed shots of #ChadSmith hit with the same whipcrack timing and stadium‑rattling swagger that helped drive #RedHotChiliPeppers into global‑tour dominance. eBay tinyurl.com/38e2fbwn and Amazon tinyurl.com/49vhpmw7

#CGC 9.8 #INVINCIBLE Universe Battle Beast #1—ferocious first‑print heat, #signed by David Finch, the powerhouse behind some of the era’s boldest comic art. eBay tinyurl.com/bdzdd7ja Amazon tinyurl.com/bdehvmfa Collectors Comics tinyurl.com/yu5hv65t

Throwback muscle 💪 This #RARE shot of #AmericanGladiators powerhouse #JimStarr is up for grabs—@beckettcollect authenticated and ready to flex straight out of the show that turned ’90s strength into primetime spectacle. eBay tinyurl.com/2t96nprt and Amazon tinyurl.com/467jn3dr

PSA‑graded #tradingcards spotlighting #NikolaJokic—the 2× MVP who turned playmaking into an art, becoming the first center ever to lead the league in assists. 🏀 eBay tinyurl.com/59eb8b89 Amazon tinyurl.com/5avvv97x and MySlabs tinyurl.com/4ze8rckh

Spotlight with style—this #JulianneMoore signed photo, authenticated by @beckettcollect, honors the Oscar winner who’s delivered masterclass performances from Still Alice to Boogie Nights to The Hunger Games. 🎬 eBay tinyurl.com/4k545544 and Amazon tinyurl.com/4mhhek6t

A flawless #OpeeChee #PSA10 salute to #BobbyOrr—the blueline revolutionary who became the only defenseman to ever win the NHL scoring title. This mint marvel isn’t just graded, it’s history sealed in plastic. #TradingCard tinyurl.com/yck4spzu

Fury with finesse—#AngelaMao didn’t just strike, she rewired the genre. The breakout force of Enter the Dragon, she rose as cinema’s first true female kung fu icon and set a standard the industry still chases. eBay tinyurl.com/y2smmjw9 and Amazon tinyurl.com/4s2jdwy2

The Sultan of Swat, sealed in perfection! 🏆 This @Topps #tradingcard of #BabeRuth is a #PSA10 gem—pristine edges for the icon who crushed 714 homers and reshaped baseball’s entire era. A relic fit for royalty. tinyurl.com/2jwfutwj

10% off Beckett‑cert autos and PSA‑graded heat, the same slabbed heavyweights that turn quiet prospects into tomorrow’s grails. The earliest sharks always claim the crown, and Amazon collectors can still strike with code AAVLPCOX. eBay tinyurl.com/39mcnwhp Amazon tinyurl.com/4wdfm4ea

Mint magic dialed up — this #PSA10 stunner from @Topps freezes #GeorgeBrett mid‑swing, the same Hall‑of‑Fame torque that produced 3,154 hits and a batting title in three different decades. Pristine grade, iconic legend, zero downside for collectors. tinyurl.com/j62uzswt

Every year I try to do something really nice for the Heroes Art Auction. The Heroes Covention is a comics show that’s welcomed and supported me for well over a decade now, and I’m always happy to give back with a new auction piece.
My wife is just starting out her new small business...any help deeply appreciated! www.ebay.com/str/kitsandk...

A great innovation that started in MLB is coming to NBA next. Topps/Fanatics will include Debut Patch logos on jerseys that will be authenicated and then used in future signed trading cards. 

This is something I can get behind.
